plugins.name: bb-spec
plugins.description: Language-agnostic Claude Code workflow constraint suite: hard Go + Vue + bun stack constraints, TDD / anti-legacy-cruft iron rules, multi-agent local review kit; output follows your working language. | 语言无关的 Claude Code 工作流约束套装：Go + Vue + bun 技术栈强约束、TDD/反历史包袱铁律、多代理本地 review 套件；产出跟随你的工作语言。
